name: @aily-project/board-arduino_uno_r4_wifi
description: The Arduino UNO R4 WiFi combines the processing power and new peripherals of the Renesas RA4M1 microcontroller with the wireless connectivity of the Espressif ESP32-S3. It also features a 12x8 LED matrix, Qwiic connector, VRTC, and OFF pin, meeting all the needs makers may encounter in their next project.
